We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.

programme.title: The Direction
programme.desc: This week, we reflect on a tragic and sad memory in our lives as we remember a dear childhood friend of my son Nick, Nathan Wimsatt. Our families have been close for man years and shared a lot of time together around the soccer field, vacations, fishing trips, and much more. Nathan passed in a tragic car accident at only 18 years on April 29th, 2023. This week his Dad Brian is joining me on Lake Taylorsville where we'll share some memories and celebrate Nathan's life...that ended way to soon!

programme.title: The Direction

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kyle Reyes checks in with Advanced Vitality to see how the team’s recommendations have already begun transforming their impact on clients. At Scout & Zoe’s, Cindy unveils a bold new commercial that captures her brand’s quirky spirit while driving sales in a competitive pet market. Over at Zenith Trek, a polished new promo video helps position their innovative product in front of the right audience. And down on the floor at Hammer Haag Steel, it’s lights, camera, action—dirty jobs style—as the crew captures raw, behind-the-scenes footage that showcases their powerful manufacturing capabilities.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team kicks things off with Bonnie Lucas of Law Enforcement Specialists, who’s on a mission to scale her police coordination service nationwide—with a game-changing app in the works. Then it’s all about beauty and impact as gallery owner David Beavis shares how his immersive landscape photography is inspiring audiences and fueling plans for expansion. Next, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage breaks down how his firm is helping Americans retire with confidence—no market risk, just guaranteed income for life. Finally, John Feldman introduces Connected & Protected, a tech-forward company keeping seniors and first responders safe across the country.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail meet with the team at Advanced Vitality to explore the cutting edge of preventative healthcare. With over 60% of Americans facing accelerated cellular aging, the company is looking to scale fast—and needs the right strategy to do it. Next, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s joins the conversation to share how her insect-based dog treats are creating buzz in the pet industry. Her clever and down-to-earth grassroots marketing approach (pun intended) is changing the game for alternative protein sources. Finally, Kevin and Toli sit down with leaders from Hammer Haag Steel and Zenith Trek to dive into the challenges and opportunities of building complex, large-scale equipment and structures.

programme.desc:

Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.desc:

It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. programme.title: Roll On Texas Moon 1946
programme.desc: Roy Rogers rides tall in Roll On Texas Moon, a Western packed with action, music, and romance. When a bitter feud erupts between cattlemen and sheep ranchers, Roy steps in to prevent bloodshed and uncover the schemers fueling the conflict. With Dale Evans, George ‘Gabby’ Hayes, and the Sons of the Pioneers along for the ride, the film blends fast-paced adventure, trail songs, and Texas charm into a classic Roy Rogers showdown.

programme.title: The Fighting Westerner
programme.desc: The heirs of the dying owner of a valuable radium mine are being murdered as a mining engineer tries to uncover the killer and clear his cousin's name.

programme.title: Mclintock! 1963
programme.desc: John Wayne leads the charge in McLintock!, a rip-roaring Western comedy brimming with action, romance, and frontier spirit. As wealthy cattle baron George Washington McLintock tries to keep the peace between feuding homesteaders, rowdy cowhands, and local Native tribes, he also faces his toughest battle yet—his fiery estranged wife (Maureen O’Hara), who’s just returned to town. Filled with slapstick brawls, lively banter, and heartwarming humor, McLintock! delivers classic Western entertainment with larger-than-life charm.

programme.title: The Gambling Terror 1937
programme.desc: In The Gambling Terror, cowboy hero Johnny Mack Brown takes on a ruthless gang that’s bleeding a frontier town dry with crooked gambling and brutal intimidation. Standing tall against the odds, he fights to bring law and order back to the West. Packed with gun-slinging action, high-stakes tension, and a dash of frontier romance, this thrilling Western proves that justice always calls the final hand.

programme.title: Tombstone Canyon
programme.desc: Maynard hears the cry of the weird masked "phantom" of Tombstone Canyon. The plot thickens when Maynard discovers a man with a key to his past has been murdered by the phantom
